title: Pterophylla decora
taxonomy: Pterophylla decora is classified as a species of stick insect in the family Phasmatidae. It belongs to the order Phasmatodea and the class Insecta. Further classification includes the family Phasmatidae, subfamily Pseudophasmatinae, and the genus Pterophylla. This stick insect is native to North America and is known for its attractive appearance. The classification of Pterophylla decora reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
